description: Ternium Argentina S.A. manufactures, produces, and processes steel products in South America, North America, Europe, and internationally. The company offers its products in flat steel, coated steel, welded tubes, various shapes, long steel, galvanized sheet, electro zinc, prepainted, cincalum, slabs, cast iron ingots, and over rolling categories. It serves construction, automotive, home appliances, agro, packaging, transport, and energy industries. The company was formerly known as Siderar S.A.I.C. Ternium Argentina S.A. Ternium Argentina S.A. was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Ternium Argentina S.A. is a subsidiary of Ternium Internacional España S.L.U.
